title: cynanchum zeyheri
intro: Cynanchum zeyheri, also known as the Kaffir cord, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to South Africa. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum zeyheri include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cynanchum zeyheri typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin.
